# Vendored Browser Libraries

These files are kept inside the extension so the unpacked Chrome extension can run without a build step or remote code loading.

| Library | Version | License | Use |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| mp4box | 2.4.1 | BSD-3-Clause | Parse Bilibili DASH/fMP4 video and audio samples. |
| mp4-muxer | 5.2.2 | MIT | Remux parsed video and audio samples into one MP4 file in the browser. |

Source projects:

- https://github.com/gpac/mp4box.js
- https://github.com/Vanilagy/mp4-muxer
